programme.title: Global Business-African Edition
programme.desc: Global Business is the flagship business show of CGTN English Channel, bringing you the latest economic data, business trends and policies.

programme.desc: Global Business is the flagship business show of CGTN English Channel, bringing you the latest economic data, business trends and policies.

programme.title: Global Business-European Edition
programme.desc: Global Business is the flagship business show of CGTN English Channel, bringing you the latest economic data, business trends and policies.

programme.title: Auto China: Driving future of mobility
programme.desc: Auto China 2026 opens on April 24, showcasing nearly 1,500 vehicles over 10 days – at a pivotal turning point for China's automotive industry. Amid commodity volatility and fractured supply chains, electrification is no longer a question of “if” but “how fast.”\nAs the world’s largest electric vehicle (EV) market and a major force of global EV sales, how is China shaping the pace and direction of this charge towards greener, smarter vehicles?\nJoin us on BizTalk this week as we explore how China and Germany are moving in step toward the next phase of the future of mobility.

programme.title: Auto China: Driving future of mobility
programme.desc: Auto China 2026 opens on April 24, showcasing nearly 1,500 vehicles over 10 days – at a pivotal turning point for China's automotive industry. Amid commodity volatility and fractured supply chains, electrification is no longer a question of “if” but “how fast.”\nAs the world’s largest electric vehicle (EV) market and a major force of global EV sales, how is China shaping the pace and direction of this charge towards greener, smarter vehicles?\nJoin us on BizTalk this week as we explore how China and Germany are moving in step toward the next phase of the future of mobility.

programme.title: Global Business-American Edition
programme.desc: Global Business is the flagship business show of CGTN English Channel, bringing you the latest economic data, business trends and policies.

programme.title: Global Business-Asian Edition
programme.desc: Global Business is the flagship business show of CGTN English Channel, bringing you the latest economic data, business trends and policies.

programme.title: From Island Farms to Cloud Power, From Mountain Hubs to Urban Beats
programme.desc: From tropical coffee aromas to high-tech computing hubs, how is China defining \"high-quality development\"? In this episode of Meet China, we journey from the fields of Wanning, Hainan, where a small coffee bean becomes a symbol of the Free Trade Port’s opening-up, to the mountains of Guizhou, where a 14-millisecond data latency is powering the rendering of global blockbusters like Ne Zha 2. Finally, we dive into the vibrant Livehouse scene of China’s megacities, exploring a $1.2 billion \"emotional economy\" that is reshaping urban nightlife. From solid digital infrastructure to the rhythmic energy of the music scene, this episode captures the heartbeat of China’s evolving economic future.

programme.title: Inside the token surge: Where does the money flow in AI?
programme.desc: From \"OpenClaw\" to open-source AI agents, token demand is exploding. But where's the real money? \nCGTN x top AI experts on the AI gold rush, key players, and the inside track on where the money flows. Listen now.

programme.title: Inside the token surge: Where does the money flow in AI?
programme.desc: From \"OpenClaw\" to open-source AI agents, token demand is exploding. But where's the real money? \nCGTN x top AI experts on the AI gold rush, key players, and the inside track on where the money flows. Listen now.

programme.desc: From \"OpenClaw\" to open-source AI agents, token demand is exploding. But where's the real money? \nCGTN x top AI experts on the AI gold rush, key players, and the inside track on where the money flows. Listen now.
